name: ssot-cli
description: Operate SSOT repositories through the PyPI-published ssot-registry distribution and its CLI aliases.

interface.shortDescription: Use the published ssot-registry package to inspect and manage SSOT repos.
interface.longDescription: Gives Codex a focused workflow for operating SSOT repositories through the PyPI-published ssot-registry package, including validation, planning, release, and export commands.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this repository with the published ssot-registry CLI.
Validate the current repo with ssot-registry and explain any failures.
Plan a boundary and release flow using ssot-registry commands.
